title: Abomsa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Abomsa with a Z-Score of +4.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Abomsa is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
The temperature is causing a significant increase in cooling degree days (CDD) with 13.1 GG, while the relative humidity is at 26%. 
The wind speed is 21.1 km/h, which is not providing significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
